// Certificate Manager view (§9 of the spec). CA is shown as already Trusted. import { MONO, dangerBtn, primaryBtn, secondaryBtn } from "../lib/ui"; const STEPS = ["Generated", "Installed", "Trusted"]; const infoRows: [string, string][] = [ ["Common Name", "AppScope Proxy CA"], ["SHA-256", "A1:9F:3C:7E:42:0B:…:D8:11"], ["Valid until", "2036-06-18"], ["Cert path", "~/Library/Application Support/AppScope/certs/rootCA.pem"], ]; export default function CertManager({ onOpenGuide }: { onOpenGuide: () => void }) { return (

Certificate Manager

AppScope 使用本机生成的 Root CA 解密经其代理的 HTTPS 流量。私钥仅保存在本机，永不上传。

🛡
AppScope Local CA
已安装并被系统信任 · 可解密 HTTPS
Trusted
{STEPS.map((label, idx) => (
✓ {label}
{idx < STEPS.length - 1 && }
))}
{infoRows.map(([k, v]) => (
{k}
{v}
))}
⚠️

信任 AppScope CA 后，AppScope 可以解密通过它代理的 HTTPS 流量。请只在你信任的设备和会话中开启抓包。不要抓取银行、支付、密码管理器等敏感应用。

); }

// Add Page modal — configure a URL for Chrome-session capture (§5.2 of the spec). import type { CSSProperties } from "react"; import { MONO, primaryBtn, secondaryBtn } from "../../lib/ui"; const inputStyle: CSSProperties = { width: "100%", boxSizing: "border-box", border: "1px solid #d8d8dc", borderRadius: 8, padding: "8px 11px", font: "13px ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace", color: "#1d1d1f", outline: "none", }; const selectStyle: CSSProperties = { border: "1px solid #d8d8dc", borderRadius: 8, padding: "8px 11px", font: "13px -apple-system,system-ui", color: "#1d1d1f", background: "#fff", }; const labelText: CSSProperties = { fontSize: 11.5, color: "#8a8a8e", display: "block", marginBottom: 5 }; export default function AddPageModal({ onClose, onOpenCertGuide }: { onClose: () => void; onOpenCertGuide: () => void }) { return (
e.stopPropagation()} style={{ width: 480, background: "#fff", borderRadius: 13, boxShadow: "0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.4)", overflow: "hidden" }}>
Add Page
添加一个 URL，通过独立 Chrome 会话抓包。
--user-data-dir=…/Profiles/profile_001
--proxy-server=127.0.0.1:9090 --disable-quic
); }

// Add App modal — pick from scanned installed apps (§5.3 of the spec). import { MONO, iconStyle, primaryBtn, secondaryBtn } from "../../lib/ui"; const SCAN: [string, string, string, string][] = [ ["Google Chrome", "com.google.Chrome", "C", "#5b6470"], ["Safari", "com.apple.Safari", "S", "#1e66d0"], ["Slack", "com.tinyspeck.slackmacgap", "S", "#7a5af0"], ["Discord", "com.hnc.Discord", "D", "#5b6470"], ["Visual Studio Code", "com.microsoft.VSCode", "V", "#1e66d0"], ]; export default function AddAppModal({ onClose }: { onClose: () => void }) { return (
e.stopPropagation()} style={{ width: 480, background: "#fff", borderRadius: 13, boxShadow: "0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.4)", overflow: "hidden" }}>
Add App
从已安装应用中选择，并指定启动模式。
{SCAN.map(([name, bundle, letter, color]) => (
{letter} {name} {bundle}
))}
启动模式：Normal · System Proxy Capture · Transparent Capture (Coming Soon)
); }
